name: Lanolin the sheep
description: Lanolin is an anthropomorphic sheep with cloudy white wool on her head for hair, a light tan muzzle with a black/salmon nose, and slate blue eyes with light powder blue sclera and two eyelashes on each one. She possesses black/brown pointy and stubby horns on top of her head, droopy medium-long ears with light tan canals. She also has a large tuft of wool on her forehead while the rest of her hair is kept in four buns by yellow hairties.
creator: qwerty_1
